data.body: 44b7 GREEN: added guarded test-only failpoint (REBAR_TEST_COMPACT_RENAME_BARRIER) to compact.py + subprocess SIGKILL recovery test (test_compact_process_death.py). Test paused real compactor mid-retirement (snapshot written, 1 source retired), SIGKILL, verified fresh-process recovery: reduce correct, no UUID lost, fsck reports SNAPSHOT_INCONSISTENT, cross-process fsck --repair-snapshots reclaims stale lock + converges, final fsck clean, state preserved. Teeth: disabling barrier -> 'compactor exited early' fail. Committing stacked on 4001.
